# init(delegate:)

**Initializer**

Creates a new waiter with the specified delegate.

## Declaration

```swift
init(delegate: (any XCTWaiterDelegate)?)
```

## Parameters

- **delegate**: The [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTWaiterDelegate] that wait events should be sent to.
title: init(delegate:)
